meta.title: TiiBnTick — Unified Logistics for Africa
meta.description: A unified logistics platform for Africa. From the neighborhood to the village, we connect everyone.

hero.subtitle: A unified logistics platform for Africa.
hero.description: From the neighborhood to the village, we connect everyone.

link.name: TiiBnTick Link
link.tagline: The solution for individuals and local commerce. Manage pre-registration, drop-off and pickup via micro-hubs, even in areas without formal addresses.

go.name: TiiBnTick Go
go.tagline: Real-time opportunity marketplace. Post parcel pickup listings and match with freelancer and benskinneur availability through geolocation.

agency.name: TiiBnTick Agency
agency.tagline: A professional management tool for transport agencies. Centralize your fleet, manage multi-site flows, billing and electronic waybills.

point.name: TiiBnTick Point
point.tagline: Instantly turn shops, stations or cybercafés into legitimate logistics actors. Manage inbound/outbound, validate parcels and track commissions.

freelancer.name: TiiBnTick Freelancer
freelancer.tagline: The dedicated app to professionalize benskinneurs and individual carriers. Build credibility with a pro profile, ride history and secure payments.

market.name: TiiBnTick Market
market.tagline: The public discovery engine. The entry point to find an agency, relay point, courier or compare available logistics services.

infrastructure.sectionDescription: Beyond the modules, a robust architecture ensures cohesion, security and traceability across the entire TiiBnTick system.

search.name: TiiBnTick Search
search.subtitle: Universal Search & Tracking
search.description: A multi-criteria search engine covering the entire ecosystem.
features: Search by QR Code, name, time range

core.name: TiiBnTick Core
core.subtitle: Shared Kernel & API
core.description: The technological backbone. The shared engine powering the entire suite.

confidence.name: TiiBnTick Confidence
confidence.subtitle: Blockchain Trust Layer
confidence.description: The trust assurance to bring informal logistics to international standards.

audience.sectionTitle: Who did we build this network for?

particulier.title: Individuals
particulier.description: Send parcels to loved ones or receive purchases, from the neighborhood to the village.

freelance.title: Freelancers & Couriers
freelance.description: Benskinneurs and couriers: find rides and secure your income.

pointRelais.title: Relay Points
pointRelais.description: Local shops: become logistics hubs and increase your foot traffic.

agence.title: Transport Agencies
agence.description: Digitize your bus or truck fleet and manage your bus stations.

commercant.title: Small Merchants
commercant.description: Informal e-merchants: easily ship your products to customers.

entreprise.title: Enterprises & NGOs
entreprise.description: Manage last-mile logistics for large-scale operations.

cta.title: Ready to connect Africa?
cta.description: Join a community of thousands of users and transform how we exchange goods.

footer.tagline: The simple and reliable solution for all your parcel shipments in Cameroon.

commencer.metaDescription: Choose the account type that fits your profile and join the TiiBnTick ecosystem.
commencer.title: What type of account would you like to create?
commencer.subtitle: Select your profile to be redirected to the platform suited to your needs.

particulier.title: Individual
particulier.description: Send and receive parcels easily, even without a formal address.

freelance.title: Freelancer / Courier
freelance.description: Professionalize your rides and secure your income.

pointRelais.title: Relay Point
pointRelais.description: Turn your shop into a logistics hub and earn commissions.

agence.title: Transport Agency
agence.description: Digitize your fleet and manage multi-site operations.

commercant.title: Small Merchant
commercant.description: Post listings and connect with available couriers.

connexion.metaDescription: Access your space on the TiiBnTick platform of your choice.
connexion.title: Sign in to your platform
connexion.subtitle: Select the platform where you have an account.

link.metaDescription: Unified logistics without formal addresses. Pre-registration, micro-hubs and secure transit for Africa's last mile.
link.heroDescription: The solution for individuals and local commerce. Manage pre-registration, drop-off and pickup via micro-hubs, even in areas without formal addresses.

heroCard.title: Simplified Shipping
heroCard.subtitle: QR Code
heroCard.description: Built to overcome the lack of addresses and fragmented services.

items.title: Address-Free Zones
items.description: Relative geolocation technology enabling delivery where addressing systems are incomplete or absent.

items.title: Micro-Hub Network
items.description: Turning small shops and call-boxes into official logistics relay points for drop-off and pickup.

items.title: Android Optimized
items.description: Lightweight architecture designed to run smoothly on widely used entry-level smartphones.

items.title: Hybrid Tracking
items.description: Complete history and data relay even during complex transits (multi-legs, multi-carriers).

steps.title: Pre-registration
steps.description: The user creates a request and receives a unique QR code before even leaving home.

steps.title: Secure Drop-off
steps.description: Handover at the Relay Point. The manager scans and validates physical entry into the network.

steps.title: Transit & Hops
steps.description: Routing through the logistics chain (inter-hubs) with traceability at every handoff point.

steps.title: Client Pickup
steps.description: SMS/Push notification. The recipient presents their secure code to collect the parcel.

cta.title: Ready to transform your logistics?
cta.description: Join the platform and get immediate access to the tools.

go.heroDescription: Real-time opportunity marketplace. Post parcel pickup listings and match with freelancer and benskinneur availability through geolocation.

heroCard.title: Active Marketplace
heroCard.subtitle: Opportunities
heroCard.description: Instantly connect clients and available couriers through geolocated matching.

items.title: Smart Matching
items.description: Algorithm connecting parcel listings with nearby available couriers.

items.title: Real-Time Visibility
items.description: Dynamic dashboard of active listings and availability on the map.

items.title: Client-Freelance Connection
items.description: Direct channel between senders and independent carriers in the ecosystem.

items.title: Inclusive Opportunities
items.description: Opening the market to benskinneurs and informal couriers for structured income.

steps.title: 1. Listing
steps.description: Merchant or individual posts a parcel pickup listing with location and time slot.

steps.title: 2. Matching
steps.description: The system suggests the nearest and best-rated available couriers.

steps.title: 3. Pickup
steps.description: The freelancer accepts the mission, collects the parcel and confirms pickup.

steps.title: 4. Delivery
steps.description: Real-time tracking until final handover and recipient confirmation.

cta.title: Ready to transform your logistics?
cta.description: Join the platform and get immediate access to the tools.

agency.metaDescription: Complete ERP for transport agencies in Africa.
agency.heroDescription: Manage your fleet, hubs and financial flows with an Offline-First suite built for local infrastructure.

heroCard.title: 360° Agency Management
heroCard.subtitle: Centralized
heroCard.description: From ground operations to accounting, everything is centralized.

items.title: Multi-Site Management
items.description: Centralized view of all agencies, depots and urban hubs from a single admin dashboard.

items.title: Offline-First Mode
items.description: Service continuity guaranteed even during internet outages, with automatic sync.

items.title: Digital Waybills
items.description: Automated billing, route sheet generation and performance reports.

items.title: Fleet Management
items.description: Vehicle tracking, driver assignment and IoT integration (GPS trackers).

steps.title: 1. Onboarding
steps.description: Create the parent structure and its branches (sales points).

steps.title: 2. Staffing
steps.description: Create agent accounts with precise roles (cashier, logistics, driver).

steps.title: 3. Operations
steps.description: Parcel processing: Registration, Labeling, Grouping, Shipping.

steps.title: 4. Monitoring
steps.description: Real-time truck tracking and client notifications on arrival.

cta.title: Ready to transform your logistics?
cta.description: Join the platform and get immediate access to the tools.

point.metaDescription: Manage your relay point and commissions.
point.heroDescription: Instantly turn shops, stations or cybercafés into legitimate logistics actors. Manage inbound/outbound, validate parcels and track commissions.

heroCard.title: Relay Point Management
heroCard.subtitle: Simplified
heroCard.description: Intuitive interface to manage daily inbound and outbound parcel flows.

items.title: Quick Registration
items.description: QR scan and instant validation of inbound and outbound parcels.

items.title: Queue Management
items.description: Organization of client pickups and in-store flow optimization.

items.title: Automatic Commissions
items.description: Transparent calculation and tracking of your revenue on each operation.

items.title: Daily Reports
items.description: Daily summary of activities, volumes and commissions earned.

steps.title: 1. Registration
steps.description: Create your Relay Point account and configure your establishment.

steps.title: 2. Validation
steps.description: Verification of your shop and activation on the TiiBnTick network.

steps.title: 3. Reception
steps.description: Welcome parcels, scan and secure storage pending pickup.

steps.title: 4. Commission
steps.description: Handover to final client and automatic commission credit.

cta.title: Ready to transform your logistics?
cta.description: Join the platform and get immediate access to the tools.

freelancer.metaDescription: The app to professionalize independent couriers.
freelancer.heroDescription: The dedicated app to professionalize benskinneurs and individual carriers. Build credibility with a pro profile, ride history and secure payments.

heroCard.title: Pro Courier Space
heroCard.subtitle: Mobile
heroCard.description: Manage missions, optimize routes and track earnings from your smartphone.

items.title: Pro Profile & Reputation
items.description: Verified badge, client ratings and ride history to build trust.

items.title: Mission Management
items.description: Accept, track and complete deliveries in real time from the app.

items.title: Route Optimization
items.description: Route suggestions and batch deliveries to maximize earnings.

items.title: Structured Revenue
items.description: Payment tracking, commissions and transparent financial history.

steps.title: 1. Registration
steps.description: Create your professional profile with documents and service area.

steps.title: 2. Mission
steps.description: Receive and accept deliveries from Go or partner agencies.

steps.title: 3. Delivery
steps.description: Collect, transport and deliver with real-time GPS tracking.

steps.title: 4. Payment
steps.description: Delivery validation and secure credit of your payment.

cta.title: Ready to transform your logistics?
cta.description: Join the platform and get immediate access to the tools.

market.heroDescription: The public showcase to find, compare and track any logistics service in the ecosystem.

heroCard.title: Service Aggregator
heroCard.subtitle: Ecosystem
heroCard.description: The entire TiiBnTick ecosystem accessible in one click.

items.title: Unified Search
items.description: Multi-criteria engine: find parcels, freelancers, agencies or relay points.

items.title: Global Tracking
items.description: End-to-end tracking regardless of carrier, via code or QR.

items.title: Comparator
items.description: Full transparency on prices, delivery times and provider reputation.

items.title: Pro Directory
items.description: Interactive map of thousands of available service points.

steps.title: 1. Need
steps.description: User searches for 'Douala Delivery' or a tracking number.

steps.title: 2. Results
steps.description: Display of best options sorted by price/reliability.

steps.title: 3. Action
steps.description: Direct booking or real-time tracking.

steps.title: 4. Feedback
steps.description: User leaves a certified review of the provider.
